creator: jsollvander@axcient.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Glaus from comment #1)

I saw that comment as well, but figured it was something old that they just forgot to cleanup. So I opened this ticket: 
https://github.com/saltstack/salt/issues/64493

But it was closed due to contextvars being needed by salt-ssh. So I guess the freebsd port should include the contextvars backport?

I don't use salt-ssh so I'm just running salt with that patch right now.
